findings.title: openai/evals
findings.description: Evals is a framework for evaluating LLMs and LLM systems, and an open-source registry of benchmarks.

findings.title: open-compass/opencompass
findings.description: OpenCompass is an LLM evaluation platform, supporting a wide range of models (Llama3, Mistral, InternLM2,GPT-4,LLaMa2, Qwen,GLM, Claude, etc) over 100+ datasets.

findings.title: open-compass/VLMEvalKit
findings.description: Open-source evaluation toolkit of large multi-modality models (LMMs), support 220+ LMMs, 80+ benchmarks

findings.title: Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard
findings.description: A full-stack AI Red Teaming platform securing AI ecosystems via OpenClaw Security Scan, Agent Scan, Skills Scan, MCP scan, AI Infra scan and LLM jailbreak evaluation.

findings.title: THUDM/AgentBench
findings.description: A Comprehensive Benchmark to Evaluate LLMs as Agents (ICLR'24)

findings.title: FreedomIntelligence/LLMZoo
findings.description: ⚡LLM Zoo is a project that provides data, models, and evaluation benchmark for large language models.⚡

findings.title: modelscope/evalscope
findings.description: A streamlined and customizable framework for efficient large model (LLM, VLM, AIGC) evaluation and performance benchmarking.

findings.title: beir-cellar/beir
findings.description: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Information Retrieval. Easy to use, evaluate your models across 15+ diverse IR datasets.

findings.title: Xnhyacinth/Awesome-LLM-Long-Context-Modeling
findings.description: 📰 Must-read papers and blogs on LLM based Long Context Modeling 🔥

findings.title: evalplus/evalplus
findings.description: Rigourous evaluation of LLM-synthesized code - NeurIPS 2023 & COLM 2024

findings.title: MLGroupJLU/LLM-eval-survey
findings.description: The official GitHub page for the survey paper "A Survey on Evaluation of Large Language Models".

findings.title: mbzuai-oryx/Video-ChatGPT
findings.description: [ACL 2024 🔥] Video-ChatGPT is a video conversation model capable of generating meaningful conversation about videos. It combines the capabilities of LLMs with a pretrained visual encoder adapted for spatiotemporal video representation. We also introduce a rigorous 'Quantitative Evaluation Benchmarking' for video-based conversational models.

findings.title: OpenGenerativeAI/llm-colosseum
findings.description: Benchmark LLMs by fighting in Street Fighter 3! The new way to evaluate the quality of an LLM

findings.title: Barca0412/Introduction-to-Quantitative-Finance
findings.description: 入门资料整理：1.多因子股票量化框架开源教程 2.学界和业界的经典资料收录 3.AI + 金融的相关工作，包括LLM, Agent, benchmark(evaluation), etc.

findings.title: Tencent/AICGSecEval
findings.description: A.S.E (AICGSecEval) is a repository-level AI-generated code security evaluation benchmark developed by Tencent Wukong Code Security Team.

findings.title: carlini/yet-another-applied-llm-benchmark
findings.description: A benchmark to evaluate language models on questions I've previously asked them to solve.

findings.title: ScalingIntelligence/KernelBench
findings.description: KernelBench: Can LLMs Write GPU Kernels? - Benchmark + Toolkit with Torch -> CUDA (+ more DSLs)

findings.title: pinchbench/skill
findings.description: PinchBench is a benchmarking system for evaluating LLM models as OpenClaw coding agents. Made with 🦀 by the humans at https://kilo.ai

findings.title: The-FinAI/PIXIU
findings.description: This repository introduces PIXIU, an open-source resource featuring the first financial large language models (LLMs), instruction tuning data, and evaluation benchmarks to holistically assess financial LLMs. Our goal is to continually push forward the open-source development of financial artificial intelligence (AI).

findings.title: MME-Benchmarks/Video-MME
findings.description: ✨✨[CVPR 2025] Video-MME: The First-Ever Comprehensive Evaluation Benchmark of Multi-modal LLMs in Video Analysis
